rationale: A0 confirms the endpoint monitoring agent on host-01 disconnected at 2024-12-01T18:46:26Z. Agent disconnection can indicate tampering (e.g., an attacker disabling EDR/monitoring), but it is also consistent with benign causes such as a service crash, network interruption, or planned maintenance. No corroborating evidence (process termination events, privilege escalation, lateral movement, etc.) is present in the package to confirm malicious intent, which caps confidence significantly. The absence of any supporting telemetry means the disconnection cannot be attributed to an attack at this time, but the event warrants prompt investigation to rule out deliberate defense evasion.
